---
title: "Fisher Young"
---

## Fisher Young

**Dates:** (d.1864)

### Description

Melanesian missionary

### Biography

He was a native of the Pitcairn community living on Norfolk Island, and was killed with arrows on Santa Cruz Island, along with Edwin Nobbs.

### Letters

- Letter from [‘Southern Cross’ between Auckland and Norfolk Island, May 1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
